|abovestyle = background-color:#f7f7f7; |above = * [[:en:Hayk|Hayk]] ([[:en:Armenians|Armenians]]) * [[:en:Manu (Hinduism)|Manu]] ([[:en:Hinduism|Hinduism]]) * [[:en:Mannus|Mannus]] (German) * [[:en:Manu and Yemo|Manu and Yemo]] ([[:en:Proto-Indo-European mythology|Indo European]]) * [[:en:Adam|Adam]], [[:en:Enoch (ancestor of Noah)|Enoch]], [[:en:Noah|Noah]], [[:en:Abraham|Abraham]] ([[:en:Judaism|Judaism]], [[:en:Christianity|Christianity]], [[:en:Islam|Islam]]) * [[:en:Samaale|Samaale]] ([[:en:Somalis|Somali]]) * [[:en:Qais Abdur Rashid|Qais Abdur Rashid]] ([[:en:Pashtuns|Pashtun]]) * [[:en:Deucalion|Deucalion]] and [[:en:Pyrrha of Thessaly|Pyrrha]] ([[:en:Greek mythology|Greek mythology]]) * [[:en:Ask and Embla|Ask and Embla]] ([[:en:Norse mythology|Norse mythology]]) * [[:en:Kintu|Kintu]] (Uganda) * [[:en:Mashya and Mashyana|Mashya and Mashyana]] ([[:en:Zoroastrianism|Zoroastrianism]]) * [[:en:Nyatri Tsenpo|Nyatri Tsenpo]] ([[:en:Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan Buddhism]]) * [[:en:Yellow Emperor|Yellow Emperor]] ([[:en:Confucianism|Confucianism]] and [[Taoism]]) * [[:en:Wurugag and Waramurungundi|Wurugag and Waramurungundi]] ([[:en:Australia|Australia]]n [[:en:Gunwinggu|Gunwinggu]]) * [[Míl Espáine ]] ([[:en:Irish people|Irish]]) * [[:en:Kartlos|Kartlos]] ([[:en:Georgians|Georgians]]) }}<noinclude> [[Category:Genealogy navigational boxes]] [[Category:Mythology navigational boxes]]
